source.section: 5 - JHMCS (Joint Helmet-Mounted Cueing System) > 5.5 - JHMCS Functions > 5.5.1 - Ground Target Designation

steps.action: Power up the JHMCS by setting HMD Brightness knob to BRT (Bright)
Press the A/G Master Mode Button

Press Sensor Control Switch FWD to toggle the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) priority between the HUD (Heads-Up Display) and the HMD (Helmet-Mounted Display). TDC priority is assigned to the helmet when the aiming reticle appears on the helmet. A center dot on the HUD’s TVV means the priority is assigned to the HUD.
Move the helmet’s Aiming Reticle on the target you want to designate.
Press the TDC Depress (« Enter ») to designate the target. A designation diamond will appear over the target, while the aiming cross will keep following your helmet.
You can slew/move the designation diamond using the TDC left/right/up/down controls.
To un-designate the target, press the Undesignate button on the stick.
